rows.label: tev030101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Aqual about the Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Aqual if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Aqual about the attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0001
rows.name:
The Ma-non are mostly pacifists, you
know? We try to to avoid fights.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0002
rows.name:
But when I saw you humans risking
your lives to save each other,
I think I had an epiphany?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0003
rows.name:
I realized the importance of keeping the
people I care about safe, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0004
rows.name:
So that's why I asked Commander
Vandham to to let me join BLADE.
Does that make sense?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0005
rows.name:
We Ma-non are not quite as robust as you humans,
but we are the smartest species in all the galaxy,
pretty much? I can pick things up as I go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0006
rows.name:
Just wait, okay? Soon I'll be a
masterful Companion resolving
conflicts all across the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0009
rows.name:
My BLADE work has been keeping me
so so busy, you know? I barely
see my dear sweetheart Yuyu...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0010
rows.name:
When I get my next break, maybe I'll
take her on a date to Army Pizza?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Of course, I still have a lot
to learn, so I may not have
earned a break, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0012
rows.name:
One day I'll be so good at my job that I
can finish early and spend lots and lots of
time with my Yuyu, you know what I mean?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0020
rows.name:
When NLA came under attack, all
the Ma-non were scared and and
confused, you know? Big time panic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0021
rows.name:
So I used my powers of quick thinking to
devise a strategy—I told the Ma-non that
I had filled our entire ship with pizza![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0022
rows.name:
Everyone piled right onto the ship,
and my superiors in BLADE commended
me. Pretty clever, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0023
rows.name:
Of course, once the crisis had subsided, the
other Ma-non had many many sternly worded
complaints about the ship's notable...lack of pizza?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0024
rows.name:
Regardless, I really feel like
a true BLADE now, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Aqual about the Growth threat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Aqual about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0025
rows.name:
While we do need to deal with the Growth's direct
assaults on the city, we must also remain mindful
of other threats as well, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0026
rows.name:
For example, how did Powell manage
to get his hands on that Doll?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0027
rows.name:
He may be ex-military, but BLADE
isn't stupid, right? They keep a
tight watch on their Dolls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0028
rows.name:
So I figured Powell must have had help, you
know? Well, when I followed up on this theory,
I discovered something quite...unsettling?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0029
rows.name:
It seems he received assistance
from other elements in the
city—non-human types, if you follow me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0030
rows.name:
I am quite certain the Growth had a hand in manipulating
Powell's derangement to their advantage. And cleverness
makes them dangerous, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0033
rows.name:
Admittedly, some family members of
Powell's Ma-non victims have developed
a markedly negative opinion of humans...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0034
rows.name:
But I intend to step in where I
can and and and make things right,
if such a goal is possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0035
rows.name:
After all, I can relate. I once had
my own proverbial bone to pick with
humans because of Yuyu, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0036
rows.name:
If it were not for you, I
might still hate humans?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev030101_MSG0037
rows.name:
So I suppose I must thank you, right? Right!
Let's team up again and bring the light of
reason to this fine fine city, okay?[ST:wait ]
